As an additional cost to play this card, destroy a card you control named  “Deoth Hemo”, a card you control named “Deoth Necro”, a card you control named “Deoth Psyche”, and a card named “Deoth Spectra”.
When The Deoth Quadrutum enters, reveal all of your zones and void all silver cards in all zones revealed this way.
When The Deoth Quadrutum leaves play, put all silver cards voided with it into your discard.
